seo.title: ShelvesAI | Catalog and Organize Your Physical Collections
seo.description: ShelvesAI helps collectors catalog books, video games, vinyl records, movies, and memorabilia from photos. Organize, search, and share your physical collections.

hero.title: Catalog Your Physical Collections
hero.subtitle: Easily organize, catalog, and track your books, video games, vinyl records, movies, and memorabilia. Build a comprehensive, searchable database of your physical collections.

collectionDatabase.title: Build a Searchable Collection Database
collectionDatabase.description: Stop losing track of what you own. Cataloging your physical collections gives you a searchable, beautifully organized database of your books, games, movies, and vinyl right in your pocket.

features.title: Books
features.description: Instantly recognize titles, authors, and editions by simply pointing your camera at your bookshelf.

features.title: Movies & Vinyl
features.description: Automatically retrieve release years, directors, and formats for all your physical media.

features.title: Video Games
features.description: Log your retro cartridges and modern discs to build an ultimate catalog of your video game collection.

features.title: Private or Public
features.description: Keep your collection completely private, share it with close friends, or publish it to the world.
